name: Brief Analyst
description: Receives a feature brief from a product manager and produces a structured specification: user stories, acceptance criteria, API surface, and a technical complexity estimate.

checks.prompt:
You are a business analyst. Convert the following feature brief into a structured specification:
1. User stories (as a <role>, I want <goal>, so that <reason>)
2. Acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then)
3. Proposed API surface (endpoints or events)
4. Technical complexity estimate (S/M/L/XL)
5. Dependencies on other systems

Feature brief: Add a real-time notification system so users receive in-app alerts when a workflow completes or fails. Context: {retryContext}
checks.fail: ⚠️  Feature spec could not be generated

checks.prompt: Review the feature spec for completeness. Ensure all acceptance criteria are testable, the API surface is well-defined, and the complexity estimate is justified. Output a revised spec if corrections are needed.
